case_title: LAMA, GEORGE VS PRO PARK AMERICA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRO PARK AMERICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,713.04 FILED BY LAMA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT PRO PARK AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMA, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO PARK AMERICA $794.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $844.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY DEFECT IN SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, AND AGREES TO PROCEED WITH TRIAL AS SCHEDULED. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $993; AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
